title: Delivery Tracking Management System
description: A NocoBase delivery dashboard for logistics teams, using AI label recognition to track shipments, exceptions, and on-time performance.
description_cn: 面向物流履约的 NocoBase 配送看板，结合 AI 面单识别，追踪运单、异常和准时率。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Delivery Tracking Management System: a delivery status board, waybill details, delivery activity logs, and AI waybill recognition for form filling. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/24-delivery-tracking.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 配送跟踪管理：配送状态看板、运单详情、配送动态记录和 AI 面单识别填表。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/24-delivery-tracking.html
